name: Your Stepmother's Inn (RPG)
description:
A story where you help your stepmother manage the family inn, she is well known in the town for attracting the attention of men, so you will have to control her and look after look after from the inn at the same time........or you can simply use it to attract more customers to the inn, it all depends on your decisions and how you decide to guide the story.

Images made by me.

Update: I added status bars, I don't know why I didn't do it, I overlooked it, I hope it works.
creator: A_Lonely_Knight
